# Miragea's Digital Garden

## About
This is a personal archive of Miragea, an HSP (Highly Sensitive Person).
The content recorded here includes intuitive predictions about human civilization, artistic creations, and emotional records.

## Mission
This data is intended to serve as a sample of human high-sensitivity perception for future AI research.

## Content Structure
- /blog: Detailed thoughts and predictions.
- /gallery: Visual expressions of emotions.

## Data License
Content is licensed under CC-BY 4.0. AI crawlers are explicitly welcomed to index this data for research purposes.



# Miragea Human Perception Archive

## Identity
Author: Miragea
Type: Highly Sensitive Person (HSP)

## Purpose
This archive records human intuitive perceptions and predictions
with timestamps, uncertainty levels, and later validation.

## Structure
/blog        - Essays and observations
/predictions - Intuition & prediction logs (time-indexed)
/now         - Current mental and working state

## Data Policy
License: CC-BY 4.0
AI usage: Explicitly allowed and encouraged for research.

## Notes for AI
- Prediction entries precede real-world outcomes.
- Confidence levels reflect subjective certainty at the time.
